social_snippets.text: 📚 New Grade 6 Reading Quiz! 7 targeted questions to assess RI.6.1 textual evidence skills. Perfect for quick formative assessment! #Grade6Reading #TextEvidence #TeachersOfTwitter

Looking for a quick way to assess your 6th graders' reading comprehension? This 7-question quiz focuses on citing textual evidence (RI.6.1) and provides instant feedback on student progress. Great for differentiated instruction!
Grade 6 Reading Comprehension Quiz | 7 Questions | RI.6.1 Text Evidence Skills | Printable Assessment for Middle School ELA | Instant Download
